overall.description: Static cinematic shot of a divination classroom in a wizarding school game (Hogwarts Legacy), featuring students seated around crystal balls with purple curtains and stone walls. Various NPCs and a white cat periodically enter and cross the room while the camera remains stationary.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular divination classroom with crystal balls and mystical tapestries

events.description: woman in yellow dress enters from left and walks across the room
student in uniform enters from right and crosses behind the seated students
white cat enters from left and walks across the floor to the right

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the classroom from a fixed position near the entrance

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow dress walking across the room from left to right
white cat walking across the floor from left to right

entered.detail: large colorful wall tapestry depicting a wizard with a telescope against a starry night background
heavy purple velvet curtains framing the tall arched windows
round wooden tables with glowing crystal balls and candles on top
tall gothic arched windows with diamond-patterned glass panes
gray stone block walls with decorative arched architectural details
circular patterned rugs on the floor beneath the seating areas

segments.scene_description: A static view of a circular divination classroom with gothic stone walls and purple velvet curtains. Students sit on cushions around tables with glowing crystal balls while warm morning light filters through the arched windows. Various NPCs including a woman in a yellow dress and a white cat enter and cross the room at different moments, creating a living atmosphere in the mystical space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, cinematic perspective of a mystical divination classroom that remains a hub of quiet activity. It begins with a wide view of the circular room, where gothic stone walls and purple velvet curtains frame students seated on cushions around glowing crystal balls. As warm morning light filters through the arched windows, the atmosphere becomes more dynamic with the intermittent movement of figures across the space. The scene then evolves as a woman in a yellow dress and a white cat enter and cross the room, adding layers of life to the still, magical environment.
